description_long: This bonsai features a slender, upright trunk with a natural brown coloration, extending into a network of exposed, radiating roots that give it a striking, elevated appearance. The foliage is composed of small, green leaves densely clustered around the upper and middle sections of the trunk, creating a lush canopy. The branches are irregularly spaced and extend outward in a somewhat radial pattern, contributing to a balanced yet organic silhouette. The trunk appears mostly straight with subtle, gentle curves, reminiscent of the formal upright bonsai style. There is no visible pot or container, and the roots are fully exposed, suggesting a stylized or artistic presentation. The overall impression is of a healthy, well-maintained bonsai suitable for decorative display in urban environments.
description: A lush, upright bonsai with a straight trunk, dense green foliage, and exposed radiating roots, presented without a visible pot.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bonsai's straight trunk, dense foliage, and symmetrical, radiating roots.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the irregular branch arrangement and the spread of the roots to the left.
description_view_2: The back view reveals a slightly sparser canopy and the full extension of the roots downward.
description_view_3: This angle displays the bonsai's balanced foliage and the even distribution of roots around the base.
attribute_pot_type: No pot is visible; the bonsai is displayed with fully exposed roots and no container.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The trunk is mostly straight with gentle, natural curves, resembling the formal upright bonsai style.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are irregularly spaced and extend outward in a radial pattern, creating a balanced but organic silhouette.
attribute_leaf_density: The foliage is dense, especially in the upper and middle sections, giving a lush and full appearance.
